description_long: This is an ornate, metallic chest with a sloped lid, adorned with intricate floral and scrollwork engravings on all visible surfaces. The most striking feature is a sculpted figure of a seated woman holding a staff and a shield, mounted atop the lid, giving the chest a regal and decorative appearance. The chest stands on four short, outward-angled feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. The front panel features a keyhole, indicating a locking mechanism, and is decorated with elaborate relief patterns. The sides and back are similarly engraved, though less prominently than the front. The overall finish is a matte, silvery-gray metal, suggesting it is made primarily of pewter or a similar alloy.
description: An ornate metallic chest with a sloped lid, intricate engravings, and a sculpted female figure on top. The chest features a keyhole and stands on four decorative feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keyhole, elaborate engravings, and the sculpted female figure prominently displayed on the lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped lid, side engravings, and the profile of the sculpted figure.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the sculpted figure and symmetrical engravings, no keyhole visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side engravings and the profile of the sculpted figure from the other direction.
